text.title: AI-Assisted Coding Protocol for Qualitative Data Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end with explicit decision-gates.

step.name: seed-codebook
step.action: Human creates codebook v1.0.0 with definitions + 2 examples per code.

step.name: ai-first-pass
step.action: LLM proposes codes for each segment with rationale + uncertainty flag.

step.name: kappa-check-on-10pct
step.input: AI codes + 10% subsample with human coder
step.decision-gate: If kappa < 0.7, revise codebook (bump semver) + re-run.

step.name: reconcile-and-finalize
step.action: Human reconciles each disagreement; updates codebook if structural.

step.name: publish-audit-trail
step.action: Write coded_segments JSON with full audit fields + kappa + codebook_version.
